brand.name: Example Drive-Footage Brand
brand.voice: Replace with the brand's actual voice guide. Warm / grounded / technical — whatever matches the on-screen content.

tiktok._comment: Direct-post — gated on your own TikTok app audit. Keep disabled until the app is approved; use upload_post_tiktok below as the default publisher.

upload_post_tiktok._comment: DEFAULT publisher. Upload-Post is an audited partner app — works today. Resolves via _PUBLISH_PRIORITY in config.py.

caption_writer._comment: Options: filename (LLM reads the file name only — cheap, generic), rules_based (LLM + brand catalog + filename parse — cheap + on-brand), vision (Gemini 2.5 Pro reads the video — paid per clip).

tasks._comment: Brand × task × output registry. Each key is a task type; each task can declare its own posting_rules, outputs, etc. The scheduler walks this at dispatch time.

posting_rules._comment: slots_local = HH:MM in the brand's timezone. variant_gap/product_gap = min posts between two files in the same variant_group/product. Starvation guard auto-relaxes if the queue only has same-group candidates left.

google_sheet._comment: Service account (GOOGLE_DRIVE_SA_JSON) must be shared as Editor on this sheet.
